# Code Anchors: PTY Bridge

- `apps/prime/server/pty-bridge.ts` — mounts the WebSocket endpoint on the upgrade seam: path gate, origin gate, shell spawn per connection.
- `apps/prime/server/pty-session.ts` — per-connection session: raw byte piping, resize/exit control messages, idempotent teardown, active-session registry.
- `apps/prime/server/pty-shell-resolve.ts` — shell resolution chain (override → default shell → POSIX fallback), launched as a login shell.
- `apps/prime/server.ts` — the shared dev/prod entry point that attaches the bridge to the app-owned HTTP server.
- `apps/prime/server/http-server.ts` — the app-owned HTTP server whose free upgrade event is the mount seam.
- `apps/prime/server/pty-bridge.spec.ts` — end-to-end verification of the endpoint with a bare WebSocket client.
